Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes literacy and appreciation of cultural diversity (Target 4.7) through language instruction.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Inferred link to Target 8.9. The course promotes '台灣文化' (local culture), a skill which can support local tourism and cultural industries.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: Promotes the social inclusion of a linguistic group (Target 10.2) and addresses historical inequalities by elevating a language suppressed during the '戒嚴時期' (martial law period).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: Directly supports Target 11.4 by teaching the Taiwanese language, a key part of intangible cultural heritage, and its connection to '台灣文學' and '台灣文化'.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Inferred link to Target 16.10 (protect fundamental freedoms). Studying songs from the '戒嚴時期' (martial law period) addresses a time when linguistic freedom was suppressed.
